extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ attacked inside final kilometer on uphill finish, held off EWAN and others after crash split peloton with 3km to go
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ attacked pink jersey ROGLIČ's group on 4% uphill finish inside 1km, exploiting crash-reduced numbers before sprinters organized
UAE exhausted leadout leaving ULISSI isolated second wheel, proving crashes favor positioned climber-puncheurs over depleted sprint trains
DUMOULIN lost 4:05 in crash 3km out, demonstrating positioning vulnerability even for GC riders on expected sprint stages

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: attacked elite group uphill inside 1km, beating pure sprinters EWAN and ACKERMANN despite losing time earlier stages
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: crashed 3km out losing 4+ minutes, appeared in distress with mechanical and visible injuries
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: stayed front group through crash chaos at 3km, pink jersey gained time on GC rivals caught behind
rider_signals.ULISSI Diego: positive: positioned second wheel with no teammates after crash eliminated sprint trains, nearly won from tactical placement
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: Italian champion dropped from reduced group on 4% uphill finish despite making front crash split
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: finished second on 4% uphill drag despite being pure sprinter, shows climbing improvement
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: limited damage in chase group behind crash, tactical non-involvement suggests stage sacrifice accepted
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: caught behind crash split with 3km remaining, positioning failure on expected sprint stage
